design_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. High-visibility athletic feel for limited gym environments. Solid dark surfaces, pure white data clarity, with neon triggers (Purple & Teal). No soft shadows, rely on 1px solid strokes.

rules: Use tracking-[0.2em] uppercase for overlines and small labels.
Never center-align by default; use left-alignment for dense content.

spacing_and_layout.general: Mobile-first approach. App-store ready layout. Wrap the entire app in a mobile container: max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] relative overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] shadow-2xl.
spacing_and_layout.bottom_nav_offset: Add pb-24 to main content to account for fixed bottom navigation.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Use p-5 for inner card padding.

surface_strategies.bottom_nav: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 h-20 flex justify-around items-center px-6 z-50
surface_strategies.paywall_card: bg-[#1A1A1A] border-2 border-[#6F61EF] rounded-3xl relative overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(111,97,239,0.2)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#6F61EF] text-white font-bold h-14 rounded-xl w-full flex items-center justify-center text-lg transition-transform active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 font-bold h-14 rounded-xl w-full flex items-center justify-center text-lg active:bg-white/5
buttons.icon_action: h-12 w-12 rounded-full bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-white

components_instructions.inputs: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/10 h-14 rounded-xl text-white px-4 focus:border-[#6F61EF] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#6F61EF] placeholder:text-white/30
components_instructions.tags: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold bg-[#39D2C0]/10 text-[#39D2C0] uppercase tracking-wider border border-[#39D2C0]/20
components_instructions.checkbox: w-6 h-6 rounded border-2 border-white/20 flex items-center justify-center data-[state=checked]:bg-[#6F61EF] data-[state=checked]:border-[#6F61EF]
components_instructions.bottom_tab_item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-white/50 data-[active=true]:text-[#6F61EF]

screens.Onboarding: Full screen flow. H1 'DEFINE YOUR GOAL'. Selectable cards for goals. Primary CTA fixed at bottom.
screens.Home: Header with 'Hello, User'. Metric cards for Streak (Teal accent). 'Today's Workout' hero card with background image and dark gradient overlay (bg-black/50 to bg-black/90).
screens.Scanner: Edge-to-edge camera UI (mocked with image). Absolute positioned UI. Floating action button for capture. Center targeting reticle using border-[#39D2C0].
screens.Detection_Confirmation: Bottom sheet layout over blurred background. List of detected machines with 'Edit'/'Delete' icons. Primary 'Generate Plan' button.
screens.Plan_Overview: Horizontal scroll for days. Vertical list of exercises grouped by muscle. Each exercise card shows sets/reps and a 'Start' button.
screens.Active_Workout: Focus mode. Big typography for sets/reps. Weight input field. Large 'Complete Set' button. Rest timer overlay (glassmorphism).
screens.Exercise_Detail: Modal/Screen. Image/Video placeholder at top (max-h-[40vh]). Title, muscle tags, step-by-step text instructions.
screens.Profile: Avatar, level progress bar. List of recent workouts.
screens.Paywall: Pro tier upsell. High visual impact. Features list with Teal checkmarks. Big Purple CTA.

image_urls.description: Dumbbells on floor, useful for mimicking a user scanning equipment.
Close up of gym equipment, for detection state.
Determined woman working out with dumbbell in dark lighting. Good for 'Today's Workout' banner.
Woman working out with medicine ball. Premium moody lighting for the PRO paywall.

rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components are strictly customized to this 'Tactical Minimalism' dark theme.
Use Shadcn components for forms, inputs, and dialogs but override their default styles to match the border/background specified here.
Avoid Vercel's default light border styles.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter. Use Barlow Condensed for headings and DM Sans for body.
Never use purely transparent headers/overlays; always use bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl.

Build this as a mobile web app representing React Native Expo, meaning the layout should be restricted to a mobile frame (max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] overflow-y-auto relative bg-[#0A0A0A] shadow-2xl) to simulate the mobile app feel.
